## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's TypeScript style (strict mode, no `any`)
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test` with no errors
- [ ] I added/updated tests for new behavior (coverage ≥ previous level)
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed (README, docs/, JSDoc)
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I did not include any secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] This PR is focused on a single concern
